3108770.name: Meat
3108770.description:
Meat - Indulge in the ultimate clicker game for meat lovers! In Meat, satisfy your cravings by beating your favorite cuts. Each piece of meat comes with a variety of delightful appearances, making every click a feast for the eyes.

Whether you're a casual gamer or a seasoned clicker enthusiast, Meat offers endless enjoyment and satisfaction. Dive into a juicy adventure and discover the joy of tenderizing to perfection.

with Variety of Meats: Enjoy a wide range of visually appealing meats.
it is simple and Addictive Gameplay: Easy to pick up, hard to put down.
and with Endless Fun: Keep clicking and discover new meats to beat.

Join the meat-loving community and experience the savory fun of Meat!
3108770.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
